_comment: Optional MCP servers used by claude-code-sdd skills. Uncomment and configure the ones you want. Each is independently optional — pipeline degrades gracefully when missing.

_pencil_example._comment: Pencil MCP — direct read/write of .pen design files used by /frontend and /backend. See https://pencil.dev for setup. Uncomment and replace the command/args/env with values from Pencil's docs.
